# @dltkrichardhuska/harmony-design-system-shadcn

> Harmony Design System — React + shadcn/ui patterns + Tailwind + Radix. Optimized for AI coding agents.

## Setup

- Read AGENTS.md in this package first
- Demo Getting Started: /getting-started on the conversion demo site (port 5177)
- Bootstrap: import `styles/globals.css` once (Tailwind v4, zero config — no preset/content) + HarmonyThemeProvider. Fonts are bundled (no @fontsource). Product-fixed builds are mode-only; the unsuffixed dev source takes `defaultProduct`.
- **Tokens:** CSS variables (`styles/tokens.css`) surfaced as Tailwind utilities via the `@theme` block in `globals.css`. No JSON token export.
- **Style:** prefer theme utilities (`bg-card`, `gap-2`, `rounded-lg`, `transition-colors`); `var(--…)` only when unmapped
- **Catalog map:** Dropdown→`Select`; Hybrid C `*Field` for labels; no Lucide / no `iconLibrary`

## Catalog → exports (do not invent)

| Catalog | Export |
|---------|--------|
| Dropdown | `Select` + `SelectField` / compounds |
| Toggle | `Toggle` / `ToggleField` |
| Accordion | compound `Accordion*` |
| ListMenu | compound `ListMenu` / `ListMenuItem` / `ListMenuButton` |
| Stepper / Step | compound `Stepper` / `Step` |
| TabStrip | compound `Tabs` / `TabsList` / `TabsTrigger` / `TabsContent` (+ `TabsAddButton`, `useTabOverflow`) |
| Tab / overflow menu | `DropdownMenu*` (NOT catalog Dropdown → that is `Select`) |
| DatePicker | `DatePicker` / `Calendar` |
| Labeled controls | `*Field` or `Field`+`Label` (no `label` on bare control) |
| Shell frame | `ShellLayout` + `ShellHeader` / `ShellFooter` / `ShellPageHeader` / `ShellPanel` / `LeftSidebar` / `RightSidebar` / `FloatingNav` (prop-driven; compose per product) |

## Exports

| Path | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `.` (bare specifier) | Root barrel — components, layouts, theme provider, `cn` |
| `.../theme` | HarmonyThemeProvider, useHarmonyTheme |
| `.../utils` | cn() |
| `.../components` | Component barrel — `Icon`, `Button`, `Spinner`, `ProgressBar`, `ButtonGroup`, `Badge`, `NotificationBadge`, `Chip`, `Avatar`, `Alert`, `Label`/`Field*`, `Input`/`InputField`, `Textarea`/`TextareaField`, `NumberInput`/`NumberField`, `RangeInput`/`RangeField`, `DateInput`/`DateInputField`, `DatePicker`/`Calendar`, `TimePicker`, `MonthPicker`, `WeekPicker`, `DateTimePicker`, `Popover`/`PickerPopup`, `Card`, `Dialog`, `Checkbox`/`CheckboxField`/`CheckboxGroup`, `RadioButton`/`RadioField`/`RadioGroup`, `Link`, `Tooltip`/`TooltipProvider`, `Toggle`/`ToggleField`, `Select`/`SelectTrigger`/`SelectValue`/`SelectContent`/`SelectItem`/`SelectField`/`SelectGroup`/`SelectLabel`/`SelectSeparator`, `Accordion`/`AccordionItem`/`AccordionTrigger`/`AccordionContent`, `ListMenu`/`ListMenuItem`/`ListMenuButton`, `Stepper`/`Step`, `Tabs`/`TabsList`/`TabsTrigger`/`TabsContent`/`TabsAddButton`/`useTabOverflow`, `DropdownMenu`/`DropdownMenuTrigger`/`DropdownMenuContent`/`DropdownMenuItem`/`DropdownMenuLabel`/`DropdownMenuSeparator`, `ShellLayout`/`ShellHeader`/`ShellFooter`/`ShellPageHeader`/`ShellPanel`/`LeftSidebar`/`RightSidebar`/`FloatingNav` (+ `*Variants` where exported) |
| `.../styles/*` | globals.css (Tailwind v4 entry), tokens.css, fonts.css, fonts/ |
| `.../registry.json` | Complete shadcn registry — one re-export shim per component (auto-generated) |

## Foundation

- Colors / typography / spacing / elevations / Dela demos teach Tailwind classes + `var(--…)`
- Product: one-time `defaultProduct` on the provider
- Do not invent per-product Tailwind hex configs or parallel token JSON

### Dela

```tsx
import { Button } from '@dltkrichardhuska/harmony-design-system-shadcn/components';

<div className="bg-dela text-dela-foreground" />
<Button variant="dela">Ask Dela</Button>
```

- Tokens: `bg-dela` / `--gradient-dela`, `text-dela-foreground` / `--dela-header-content-fg`, `--gradient-dela-hover-bg`
- CTA: `Button` `variant="dela" | "dela-pill"` — no `DelaButton` export
- Demo: /foundation/dela

## Button

```tsx
import { Button } from '@dltkrichardhuska/harmony-design-system-shadcn/components';

<Button variant="primary">Save</Button>
<Button variant="secondary" icon="pencil">Edit</Button>
<Button variant="dela">Ask Dela</Button>
<Button icon="plus" aria-label="Add" />
```

- shadcn-style `cva` (`buttonVariants`) + Harmony CSS tokens; not stock shadcn `default`/`destructive`-only API
- Full props: `variant`, `buttonType` (`theme`|`pageHeader`), `size` `xs`–`lg`, `orientation`, `loading`/`loadingText`, `icon`/`iconPosition`, `fullWidth`, `href`, `asChild`
- Events: native `onClick` etc. via `ButtonHTMLAttributes` / `AnchorHTMLAttributes`; `href`→`<a>`; `asChild`→Radix Slot
- Icons via Harmony `icon` name strings — not Lucide children
- Loading: `loading`/`loadingText` (private SVG) **or** nest `<Spinner />` as children when not using `loading`
- See docs/components/Button.md

## Spinner

```tsx
import { Spinner } from '@dltkrichardhuska/harmony-design-system-shadcn/components';

<Spinner />
<Spinner size="lg" />
<Spinner icon="arrow-path" size="sm" />
```

- Stock shadcn Spinner pattern; default = Harmony CSS border ring (not Lucide)
- Props: `size` (`sm`|`md`|`lg`), optional `icon` (Harmony Icon name), `className`, `aria-label` (default `"Loading"`)
- Forwards `ref` + HTML attrs on root `<span>` (`role="status"`)
- See docs/components/Spinner.md

## ProgressBar

```tsx
import { ProgressBar } from '@dltkrichardhuska/harmony-design-system-shadcn/components';

<ProgressBar value={40} />
<ProgressBar value={72} size="lg" variant="success" showLabel />
```

- Radix Progress + Harmony tokens; export `progressBarVariants`
- Props: `value`, `max?` (default `100`), `size` (`sm`|`md`|`lg`), `variant` (`default`|`success`|`warning`|`error`), `showLabel?`
- See docs/components/ProgressBar.md

## ButtonGroup

```tsx
import { ButtonGroup, Button } from '@dltkrichardhuska/harmony-design-system-shadcn/components';

<ButtonGroup variant="default">
  <Button variant="primary" size="sm">Day</Button>
  <Button variant="ghost" size="sm">Week</Button>
</ButtonGroup>
```

- Shell for package `Button` children — **not** ToggleGroup; selection = child `primary`
- Default: strip child borders (shell only); horizontal stacks full-width below 768px
- Props: `variant` (`default`|`outline`), `size`, `orientation`, `children`; export `buttonGroupVariants`
- See docs/components/ButtonGroup.md

## Badge

```tsx
import { Badge } from '@dltkrichardhuska/harmony-design-system-shadcn/components';

<Badge>Default</Badge>
<Badge variant="success" size="sm" icon="check-circle">Done</Badge>
```

- Astro `small`/`medium`/`large` → `sm`/`md`/`lg` (default `lg`); export `badgeVariants`
- Props: `variant` (`default`|`primary`|`success`|`warning`|`error`|`info`|`orange`|`pink`|`disabled`), `size`, `icon?`, `children`
- See docs/components/Badge.md

## NotificationBadge

```tsx
import { Icon, NotificationBadge } from '@dltkrichardhuska/harmony-design-system-shadcn/components';

<NotificationBadge type="number" value={3} variant="error">
  <Icon name="bell" />
</NotificationBadge>

<NotificationBadge type="dot" variant="primary" />
```

- Prefer `children` anchor (auto top-right) — do not hand-roll absolute wrappers
- Discriminated `type`; export `notificationBadgeVariants`
- Status labels → `Badge`. See docs/components/NotificationBadge.md

## Chip

```tsx
import { Chip } from '@dltkrichardhuska/harmony-design-system-shadcn/components';

<Chip label="Filters" icon="funnel" onClick={() => {}} />
<Chip type="overflow" overflowCount={5} />
<Chip removable label="Tag" onRemove={() => {}} />
```

- No stock shadcn Chip; no `selected`/`static` props; export `chipVariants`
- Props: `size`, `variant` (`fill`|`outline`), `type` (`chip`|`horiz-dots`|`vert-dots`|`overflow`), `overflowCount?`, `label?`, `icon?`, `removable?`, `onRemove?`, `disabled?`, `onClick?`
- See docs/components/Chip.md

## Avatar

```tsx
import { Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback } from '@dltkrichardhuska/harmony-design-system-shadcn/components';

<Avatar variant="icon" />
<Avatar variant="initials" initials="Ada Lovelace" />
<Avatar variant="image" src="/avatar.jpg" alt="Ada" />
<Avatar interactive onClick={() => {}} initials="AL" />
```

- Convenience + compound `AvatarImage`/`AvatarFallback`; export `avatarVariants`
- Props: `size`, `variant` (`icon`|`initials`|`image`), `initials?`, `src?`, `alt?`, `interactive?`, `disabled?`, `onClick` when interactive
- See docs/components/Avatar.md

## Alert

```tsx
import { Alert } from '@dltkrichardhuska/harmony-design-system-shadcn/components';

<Alert variant="success" title="Saved">Stored.</Alert>
<Alert
  appearance="enhanced"
  variant="warning"
  dismissible
  onDismiss={() => {}}
  progressValue={45}
  primaryAction={{ label: 'Retry', onClick: () => {} }}
>
  Upload in progress.
</Alert>
```

- Use `appearance` (not Astro `style`); compound `AlertTitle`/`AlertDescription`/`AlertAction`; `progressValue` composes `ProgressBar`
- Props: `variant`, `appearance`, `title?`, `dismissible?`, `onDismiss?` (controlled), `icon?`, actions/link, `progressValue?`, `children`
- See docs/components/Alert.md

## Label + Field

```tsx
import { Label, Field, FieldLabel, Input, InputField } from '@dltkrichardhuska/harmony-design-system-shadcn/components';

<Field>
  <FieldLabel htmlFor="email">Email</FieldLabel>
  <Input id="email" type="email" />
</Field>
<InputField label="Email" labelVariant="inline" type="email" />
```

- Prefer Field composition; `*Field` for one-shot labeled layouts; **no** `label` on bare Input/Textarea/NumberInput/RangeInput
- Label: `htmlFor`, `required`, `helper`. Field: `orientation` `stacked`|`horizontal`
- See docs/components/Label.md

## Input / Textarea

```tsx
import { Input, Textarea, InputField } from '@dltkrichardhuska/harmony-design-system-shadcn/components';

<Input icon="magnifying-glass" error errorMessage="Required" />
<Textarea rows={4} />
```

- Input: `error`, `errorMessage`, `icon`, `trailingIcon`, `trailing`; HTML attrs + ref
- Trailing actions: icon-only ghost `Button` with `h-full w-full` + muted/primary text colors to fill the right gutter (keeps ghost `--hover-bg`)
- Textarea: no error API; see docs/components/Input.md, Textarea.md

## NumberInput / RangeInput

```tsx
import { NumberInput, RangeInput, NumberField } from '@dltkrichardhuska/harmony-design-system-shadcn/components';

<NumberInput value={1} min={0} onChange={setQty} />
<RangeInput value={75} showPercent onChange={setVol} />
```

- NumberInput: Button+Icon steppers; RangeInput: Radix Slider; `onChange(value: number)`
- See docs/components/NumberInput.md, RangeInput.md

## Date / time

```tsx
import { DateInput, DateInputField, Calendar } from '@dltkrichardhuska/harmony-design-system-shadcn/components';

<DateInput type="date" value={date} onChange={setDate} />
<DateInputField label="Select Date" labelVariant="stacked" value={date} onChange={setDate} />
<Calendar value={date} onSelect={setDate} />
```

- DateInput + DateInputField (same Field hybrid as Input); panels: DatePicker/Calendar, TimePicker, MonthPicker, WeekPicker, DateTimePicker; Popover/PickerPopup
- DateInput `onChange(string)`; panels `onSelect(string)` ISO shapes
- Stack: react-day-picker + Radix Popover + date-fns; Icon names only
- See docs/components/DateInput.md

## Card

```tsx
import { Card } from '@dltkrichardhuska/harmony-design-system-shadcn/components';

<Card title="Title" description="Subtitle" elevated>Body</Card>
```

- Compound CardHeader/Title/Description/Action/Content/Footer; Harmony elevated|interactive|primary
- Convenience title/description; CardAction + Button icon (no icon1/2/3)
- See docs/components/Card.md

## Dialog

```tsx
import { Dialog, DialogTrigger, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogBody, DialogFooter, Button } from '@dltkrichardhuska/harmony-design-system-shadcn/components';

<Dialog>
  <DialogTrigger asChild><Button>Open</Button></DialogTrigger>
  <DialogContent>
    <DialogHeader><DialogTitle>Confirm</DialogTitle></DialogHeader>
    <DialogBody>…</DialogBody>
    <DialogFooter confirmLabel="Confirm" cancelLabel="Cancel" />
  </DialogContent>
</Dialog>
```

- Radix Dialog; header variant primary; footer buttonAlignment + convenience confirm props
- Icon x-mark close; no Lucide / openDialog; resizable skipped
- See docs/components/Dialog.md

## Checkbox / Radio / Link / Tooltip

```tsx
import {
  CheckboxField, CheckboxGroup, RadioGroup, RadioField, Link,
  TooltipProvider, Tooltip, TooltipTrigger, TooltipContent, Button,
} from '@dltkrichardhuska/harmony-design-system-shadcn/components';

<CheckboxField label="Email" name="email" />
<RadioGroup defaultValue="a" name="g"><RadioField label="A" value="a" /></RadioGroup>
<Link href="/x" external>Ext</Link>
<TooltipProvider>
  <Tooltip>
    <TooltipTrigger asChild><Button>Tip</Button></TooltipTrigger>
    <TooltipContent text="Hello" position="top" />
  </Tooltip>
</TooltipProvider>
```

- Hybrid C: no `label` on bare Checkbox/RadioButton — use `*Field` or Label
- Checkbox indicator: Icon `check`; radio dot is CSS; Link external uses Icon
- Tooltip: skip `cornerVariant`; Link: skip responsive default size
- See docs/components/Checkbox.md, CheckboxGroup.md, RadioButton.md, RadioGroup.md, Link.md, Tooltip.md

## Toggle

Use package **`Toggle`** (Radix Switch) + **`ToggleField`** for labels. No `label` on bare Toggle. Segmented variant skipped.

```tsx
import { Toggle, ToggleField } from '@dltkrichardhuska/harmony-design-system-shadcn/components';

<ToggleField label="Enable notifications" />
<Toggle aria-label="Compact" defaultChecked size="sm" />
```

- Props: `checked`/`onCheckedChange`, `size` `sm`|`md`, `disabled`, `name`/`id`. Export `toggleVariants`.
- See `docs/components/Toggle.md`.

## Select (Dropdown)

Catalog **Dropdown** → package **`Select`**. Compose **SelectItem** children (no `options[]`). Use **`SelectField`** for Hybrid C labels.

```tsx
import {
  Select, SelectTrigger, SelectValue, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectField,
} from '@dltkrichardhuska/harmony-design-system-shadcn/components';

<SelectField label="Country" placeholder="Select a country">
  <SelectItem value="us">United States</SelectItem>
</SelectField>
```

- Radix `value`/`onValueChange`; chevron via package Icon. See `docs/components/Select.md`.

## Accordion

Compound Radix Accordion only — no Astro `items[]`.

```tsx
import {
  Accordion, AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger, AccordionContent,
} from '@dltkrichardhuska/harmony-design-system-shadcn/components';

<Accordion type="single" collapsible>
  <AccordionItem value="a">
    <AccordionTrigger>Title</AccordionTrigger>
    <AccordionContent>Body</AccordionContent>
  </AccordionItem>
</Accordion>
```

- `type="multiple"` maps Astro `allowMultiple`. Chevron: Icon `chevron-down`. See `docs/components/Accordion.md`.

## ListMenu

Vertical nav/selection list. Compound shaped like stock **SidebarMenu** but standalone — no Astro `items[]`.

```tsx
import {
  ListMenu, ListMenuItem, ListMenuButton, Icon,
} from '@dltkrichardhuska/harmony-design-system-shadcn/components';

<ListMenu>
  <ListMenuItem>
    <ListMenuButton isActive icon="home">Dashboard</ListMenuButton>
  </ListMenuItem>
  <ListMenuItem>
    <ListMenuButton asChild>
      <a href="/profile"><Icon name="user" size="md" /><span>Profile</span></a>
    </ListMenuButton>
  </ListMenuItem>
</ListMenu>
```

- `ListMenu.variant` `default` | `no-borders`; `ListMenuButton.isActive` (not Astro `active`), `icon` name, `asChild` (Radix Slot → `<a>`/Link)
- No Radix component, no `useSidebar`; icons via package `Icon`; export `listMenuVariants` / `listMenuButtonVariants`
- See `docs/components/ListMenu.md`

## Stepper / Step

Custom compound (no Radix). `Stepper` clones `Step` children to inject index/state.

```tsx
import { Stepper, Step } from '@dltkrichardhuska/harmony-design-system-shadcn/components';

<Stepper activeStep={1} nonLinear onStepClick={setActive}>
  <Step completed success>Account</Step>
  <Step icon="user">Profile</Step>
  <Step disabled description="Unavailable">Payment</Step>
</Stepper>
```

- `Stepper`: `activeStep`, `orientation` `horizontal|vertical`, `nonLinear`, `onStepClick(index)` (replaces `stepper:step-clicked`)
- `Step`: `completed`/`disabled`/`error`/`warning`/`success`, `icon` name, `description` (replaces `slot="description"`); state icon priority error>warning>success>completed>number
- See `docs/components/Stepper.md`

## TabStrip (Tabs)

Radix Tabs compound. Compose triggers/actions/add-tab/overflow instead of Astro `tabs[]`.

```tsx
import {
  Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent, TabsAddButton, useTabOverflow,
} from '@dltkrichardhuska/harmony-design-system-shadcn/components';

<Tabs defaultValue="overview">
  <TabsList>
    <TabsTrigger value="overview">Overview</TabsTrigger>
    <TabsTrigger value="features" icon="star">Features</TabsTrigger>
    <TabsAddButton onClick={addTab} />
  </TabsList>
  <TabsContent value="overview">…</TabsContent>
</Tabs>
```

- `TabsList.variant` `default|compact|pill` (pill VP-only), `iconPosition`, `overflow` `none|scroll` (auto move-into-menu = compose `useTabOverflow`)
- `TabsTrigger`: `value`, `icon` (name string) or compose `<Icon>` child, `iconPosition`, `disabled`, `asChild` (router links), `actions` (per-tab toolbar via composed Button/DropdownMenu)
- Events → callbacks: `tab-strip:tab-selected`→`onValueChange`, `add-tab`→`TabsAddButton onClick`, `close-tab`/`open-new-window`→`actions` Button `onClick`, `set-default`→`DropdownMenuItem onSelect`
- Auto overflow: `useTabOverflow(count, { reserve })` → hide triggers with `index >= hiddenFrom`, surface in a `DropdownMenu`
- See `docs/components/TabStrip.md`

## DropdownMenu

Radix Dropdown Menu for kebab/overflow menus (NOT catalog Dropdown → that is `Select`). Inlines the same tokens as `Select` for identical popovers.

```tsx
import {
  DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuTrigger, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuItem,
} from '@dltkrichardhuska/harmony-design-system-shadcn/components';
```

- `DropdownMenuItem` uses `onSelect`; do not extract a shared menu-style module or refactor `Select`
- See `docs/components/DropdownMenu.md`

## Shell (application frame)

Prop-driven, composition-based app frame. **No runtime product switching** — compose the pieces for the surface you want (CP → `FloatingNav`, no footer; VP/PPM/Maconomy → `ShellFooter`, no floating nav).

```tsx
import {
  ShellLayout, ShellHeader, LeftSidebar, RightSidebar,
  ShellPageHeader, ShellFooter, FloatingNav, ShellPanel,
} from '@dltkrichardhuska/harmony-design-system-shadcn/components';

<ShellLayout
  productVariant="standard"
  header={<ShellHeader productName="Vantagepoint" />}
  leftSidebar={<LeftSidebar variant="vp" />}
  rightSidebar={<RightSidebar variant="vp" />}
  footer={<ShellFooter value={tab} onValueChange={setTab} tabs={tabs} />}
>
  <ShellPageHeader title="Projects" primaryButton={{ text: 'New', icon: 'plus' }} />
</ShellLayout>
```

- `ShellLayout` — grid frame; slot props `header`/`leftSidebar`/`rightSidebar`/`footer`/`floatingNav`/`leftPanel`/`rightPanel`/`children`; grid derives from slot presence; `productVariant` (`cp`|`standard`) tunes spacing only.
- `ShellHeader` — brand + company picker + Avatar; `actions` override. Company list is per-customer: `companies` (`{id,name,color}[]`) + `defaultSelectedId` (or controlled `selectedId`) + `onCompanyChange`; `companyColor` overrides indicator/gradient.
- `ShellPageHeader` — `title`/`subtitle` + `outlineButtons[]` then `primaryButton`, or `actions`.
- `ShellFooter` — composes `Tabs`; `tabs[]` + `value`/`onValueChange` + `showAddButton` + `variant`.
- `FloatingNav` — CP toolbar; `variant` `full`|`compact`, `showExecute`, `saveDisabled`, callbacks, `actions`.
- `ShellPanel` — **non-modal** drawer; `side`, `open`/`onOpenChange`, `title`/`titleIcon`, `headerVariant` `theme`|`default`, `width` `narrow`|`full`, `gradientHeader`, `showClose`/`showPopout`.
- `LeftSidebar`/`RightSidebar` — hover-expand icon rails; `variant` (default sections) or `sections`; controlled `activeId`+`onItemSelect` drive a `ShellPanel`; `RightSidebar` leads with Dela AI.
- Custom (not stock shadcn `sidebar`/`sheet` blocks) — hover-expand rail + non-modal inline panel do not fit those; API follows shadcn slot/`open`/`onOpenChange` conventions. Ships `styles/shell.css` via `globals.css`.

## Icon

```tsx
import { Icon } from '@dltkrichardhuska/harmony-design-system-shadcn/components';

<Icon name="home" />
<Icon name="check-circle" size="lg" variant="outline" />
<Icon name="x-mark" />
```

- Props: `name` (required), `size` (`xs`–`xl`, default `md`), `variant` (`outline`|`solid`), `className`
- Presentational only (`aria-hidden`) — wrap in `<button>` / use `Button` `icon` for clicks
- Resolve: manifest → Heroicons → Tabler → custom SVG → fallback (internal only — do not import those packages)
- Requires `HarmonyThemeProvider` (product for manifest)
- **Only** public icon API for Harmony UI. Do **not** use `lucide-react`, `@heroicons/react`, or `@tabler/icons-react` at call sites.
- If about to import Lucide: use Harmony names (`home`, `check-circle`, `x-mark`, `magnifying-glass`, `chevron-down`).
- Ignore stock shadcn `iconLibrary` — it cannot emit Harmony `Icon`. Omit from consumer `components.json`.
- See docs/components/Icon.md

## Component docs

- docs/components/ — per-component markdown (added when each element syncs)
- docs/foundation.md — foundation notes

## Stack rules

Use Tailwind + Radix + shadcn patterns. Do not introduce foreign UI libraries.
